trigger: 前世回忆中新婚第二日在沈府正堂，用瓷片自杀未遂

appearance_delta.face: 泪痕满面，眼神绝望愤怒
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 手腕血迹，握碎的瓷片，苍白面容

visual_reference: desperate Chinese woman in disheveled hanfu with blood on wrist, broken porcelain shards in hand, tears streaming down face, messy hair with tilted hairpins, pale complexion, eyes full of rage and despair, ancient China interior, tragic atmosphere
emotional_tone: 极度绝望愤怒，崩溃边缘
